description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, angular form and a predominantly reddish-brown coloration. The surface displays a mix of textures, with some areas appearing slightly glossy or wet, especially on the upper faces, while other regions are matte and granular. The rock has a natural, weathered appearance, with subtle color variations ranging from light tan to deeper rust and brown tones. Edges are uneven and jagged, with some flatter planes and a few sharper ridges. The overall mass and density suggest it is composed primarily of solid stone, likely sandstone or a similar sedimentary rock. Its size and form make it suitable as a natural obstacle or decorative element in urban parks, landscaped medians, or roadside environments.
description: A medium, reddish-brown, rough-textured rock with jagged edges and subtle glossy patches, resembling weathered sandstone.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rock's upper surface, which appears slightly glossy and uneven, with a mix of light and dark reddish-brown tones.
description_view_1: The side profile reveals a more angular, blocky shape with a matte, granular texture and deeper brown coloration.
description_view_2: This angle shows a prominent ridge and a rough, pitted surface with scattered glossy spots and a triangular silhouette.
description_view_3: The broadest side is visible here, displaying a flatter, more expansive surface with mottled reddish and tan hues and a rugged texture.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped roadside median
